---
title: "modeling"
---

Data are species 250 km cell combos (not seasonal or monthly)

```{r}

library(brms)
library(projpred)
library(splines)
library(sjPlot)
library(optimx)

f <- "black_20 ~ (onset + ns(tmean, 2) + ns(vpd_max, 2))^3 + (1 | species) + (1 | cell)"

m_full <- brm(
  black_20 ~ (onset + ns(tmean, 2) + ns(vpd_max, 2))^3 + (1 | species) + (1 | cell),
  data = d,
  family = gaussian(),
  save_pars = save_pars(all = TRUE),  # Needed for projpred
  chains = 3, cores = 4, iter = 3000, control = list(adapt_delta = 0.95)
)

plot_model(m_full)
```

```{r}

vs <- varsel(m_full)

prj <- project(vs, nv = 1:10)
```

```{r}

plot(vs)

suggest_size(vs)

best_k <- suggest_size(vs)

terms(prj)
```

LMER version

```{r}

library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)   # for step() with mixed models
library(buildmer)   # optional: better stepwise selection
library(splines)
library(sjPlot)

f_lmer <- black_20 ~ (onset + ns(tmean, 2) + ns(vpd_max, 2))^3 + 
          (1 | species) + (1 | cell)

m_full_lmer <- lmer(f_lmer, data = d, REML = FALSE)

```

```{r}

# This will walk through fixed effects, keeping the random structure constant
m_step <- step(m_full_lmer)
summary(m_step)
```

Buildmer version

```{r}

library(buildmer)
library(sjPlot)
library(lme4)
library(splines)
library(dplyr)
library(car)

d_sp_cell2 <- readRDS("d_sp_cell2.rds")
d <- d_sp_cell2
d <- na.omit(d)
d$cell <- as.factor(d$cell)
d$species <- as.factor(d$species)
d$vpd_max <- d$vpdmax
d$vpd_max <- scale(d$vpd_max)[,1]
d$tmean <- scale(d$tmean)[,1]
d$srad <- scale(d$srad)[,1]
d$vp <- scale(d$vp)[,1]
d$onset <- scale(d$onset)[,1]
cor.test(d$vpd_max, d$tmean)

d$wing_length <- scale(d$wing_length)[,1]
d <- d %>% filter(flight_type != "intermediate")

m_build <- buildmer(
  black_20 ~ (onset + ns(tmean, 2) + ns(vpd_max, 2) + ns(srad,2))^2 +
    (1 | species) + (1 | cell),
  data = d,
  buildmerControl = buildmerControl(
    direction = "backward",
    include = list(
      # keep both basis functions of each spline together
      "ns(tmean, 2)"   = c("ns(tmean, 2)1",   "ns(tmean, 2)2"),
      "ns(vpd_max, 2)" = c("ns(vpd_max, 2)1", "ns(vpd_max, 2)2"),
      "ns(srad, 2)" = c("ns(srad, 2)1", "ns(srad, 2)2")
    ),
    crit = "AIC",
    elim = "AIC"
  )
)
m <- m_build@model

summary(m)
sjPlot::plot_model(m)

vif(m)

plot_model(m,terms=c("tmean", "onset [0]"),type="pred")
plot_model(m, type = "pred", terms = c("tmean","onset"))
plot(ggpredict(m, terms = c("tmean [all]", "onset [-2, 0, 2]")))

plot_model(m,terms=c("vpd_max", "onset [0]"),type="pred")
plot_model(m, type = "pred", terms = c("vpd_max","onset"))
plot_model(m, type = "pred", terms = c("tmean","onset"))
plot_model(m, type = "pred", terms = c("vpd_max","flight_type"))
plot_model(m, type = "pred", terms = c("onset","flight_type"))

plot_model(m,terms=c("srad"),type="pred")
plot_model(m, type = "pred", terms = c("srad","vpd_max"))
plot_model(m, type = "pred", terms = c("vpd_max","srad"))
plot(ggpredict(m, terms = c("tmean [all]", "onset [-2, 0, 2]")))

plot_model(m, type = "pred", terms = c("vpd_max","wing_length"))
plot_model(m, type = "pred", terms = c("onset"))

library(ggeffects)
library(ggplot2)

# temperature doesnt have a relationship by itself
plot(ggpredict(m, terms = c("tmean", "onset [0]")))
plot(ggpredict(m, terms = c("tmean [all]", "onset [-2, 0, 2]")))
#
plot(ggpredict(m, terms = c("vpd_max", "onset [0]")))

# darker where wet AND early onset 
plot(ggpredict(m, terms = c("vpd_max [all]", "onset [-2, 0, 2]")))
plot(ggpredict(m, terms = c("vpd_max", "onset [0]")))
plot(ggpredict(m, terms = c("tmean", "onset [0]")))
```

```{r}

library(buildmer)
library(glmmTMB)
library(splines)
library(sjPlot)

# Make sure your response is in (0, 1) — not 0 or 1 exactly
d$black_20 <- (d$black_20 * (nrow(d) - 1) + 0.5) / nrow(d)
d$latitude <- scale(d$latitude)[,1]
d$vp <- scale(d$vp)[,1]
d$vp_resid <- scale(d$vp_resid)[,1]
# Run beta regression with buildglmmTMB
m_build <- buildglmmTMB(
  black_20 ~ (onset + ns(tmean, 2) + ns(srad,2))^2 +
    (1 | species) + (1 | cell),
  data = d,
  family = beta_family(),
  buildmerControl = buildmerControl(
    direction = "backward",
    include = list(
      "ns(tmean, 2)"   = c("ns(tmean, 2)1",   "ns(tmean, 2)2"),
      "ns(vp_resid, 2)"   = c("ns(vp_resid, 2)1",   "ns(vp_resid, 2)2"),
      "ns(srad, 2)"    = c("ns(srad, 2)1",    "ns(srad, 2)2")
    ),
    crit = "AIC",
    elim = "AIC"
  )
)

m <- m_build@model

summary(m)
sjPlot::plot_model(m)

plot_model(m,terms=c("tmean [all]"),type="pred")
plot_model(m, type = "pred", terms = c("tmean","onset"))
plot(ggpredict(m, terms = c("tmean [all]", "onset [-2, 0, 2]")))

plot_model(m,terms=c("vpd_max [all]"),type="pred")
plot_model(m, type = "pred", terms = c("vpd_max","onset"))
plot_model(m, type = "pred", terms = c("tmean","onset"))
plot_model(m, type = "pred", terms = c("vpd_max","flight_type"))
plot_model(m, type = "pred", terms = c("onset","flight_type"))

plot_model(m,terms=c("tmean"),type="pred")
plot_model(m,terms=c("vp"),type="pred")

plot_model(m, type = "pred", terms = c("srad [all]","vpd_max"))
plot_model(m, type = "pred", terms = c("srad","onset"))
plot(ggpredict(m, terms = c("tmean [all]", "onset [-2, 0, 2]")))

plot_model(m,terms=c("latitude","onset"),type="pred")
plot_model(m, type = "pred", terms = c("vpd_max","wing_length"))
plot_model(m, type = "pred", terms = c("onset"))

plot_model(m, type = "pred", terms = c("vp_resid","srad"))

plot_model(m, type = "pred", terms = c("tmean","onset"))
plot_model(m, type = "pred", terms = c("srad","onset"))
plot_model(m, type = "pred", terms = c("srad"))

plot_model(m, type = "pred", terms = c("onset"))

```

Low vifs

```{r}

library(lme4)
cor(select(d, onset, tmean, vpd_max, srad))

d$vp_resid <- resid(lm(vp ~ tmean + srad, data = d))
test <- lmer(black_20 ~ srad + tmean + vp_resid + (1|species) + (1|cell), data=d)
vif(test)
```

OG lat figs

```{r}


library(lme4)
library(splines)
library(dplyr)
library(sjPlot)

d <- as.data.frame(d)
d$onset_sc <- scale(d$onset)[,1]

m1 <- lmer(black_20 ~ cell_lat * onset_sc + (1|species) + (1|cell), data=d)
m2 <- lmer(black_20 ~ ns(cell_lat,2) * onset_sc + (1|species) + (1|cell), data=d)

# note: terms is a *single* string "cell_lat [all]"
plot_model(m1,terms=c("cell_lat"),type="pred")
plot_model(m2,terms=c("cell_lat"),type="pred",show.data = TRUE)

plot_model(m2, type = "pred", terms = c("cell_lat","onset_sc [-2, 0, 2]"),show.data=TRUE,alpha=0.1)

AIC(m1)
AIC(m2)
```

```{r}

library(lme4)
library(ggeffects)

m1 <- lmer(black_20 ~ cell_lat + (1|species) + (1|cell), data = d)
m2 <- lmer(black_20 ~ ns(cell_lat, 2) + (1|species) + (1|cell), data = d)

# 1) Linear effect
pred1 <- ggpredict(m1, terms = "cell_lat")
plot(pred1)  # simple plot of predicted black_20 vs cell_lat

# 2) Spline effect
pred2 <- ggpredict(m2, terms = "cell_lat")
plot(pred2)
```

```{r}
# linear
pred1 <- ggpredict(m1, terms = "cell_lat [all]")
plot(pred1)

# spline
pred2 <- ggpredict(m2, terms = "cell_lat [all]")
plot(pred2)
```

```{r}

pp <- plot_model(
  m2,
  type      = "pred",
  terms     = c("cell_lat", "onset_sc [-2, 0, 2]"),
  show.data = TRUE
)

# recolor layer 2 (the data points) to black:
pp$layers[[1]]$aes_params$colour <- "black"
pp$layers[[1]]$aes_params$alpha <- 0.05
pp +
  labs(
    title  = NULL,            # remove title
    x      = "Latitude",      # new x label
    y      = "Mean black body coverage",  # new y label
    colour = "Scaled onset"   # new legend title
  ) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_blank()  # make sure title is gone
  )
```

Check how different variable combos leads to different results, and verify VIFs

```{r}

library(buildmer)
library(glmmTMB)
library(splines)
library(sjPlot)
library(ggeffects)


myBuildmer <- function(climate_vars = c("tmean_sc", "srad_sc"),data,vifs=TRUE) {
  d <- data
  # ensure needed packages
  if (!requireNamespace("splines", quietly = TRUE)) {
    stop("Package 'splines' is required but not installed.")
  }
  if (!requireNamespace("sjPlot", quietly = TRUE)) {
    stop("Package 'sjPlot' is required but not installed.")
  }
  
  # 1. Build spline term strings
  spline_terms <- paste0("ns(", climate_vars, ", 2)")
  
  # 2. Assemble fixed‐effect RHS: (onset + splines...)^2
  fixed_parts <- c("onset_sc", spline_terms)
  rhs <- paste0("(", paste(fixed_parts, collapse = " + "), ")^2")
  
  # 3. Full formula with random effects
  full_formula <- as.formula(paste(
    "black_20 ~",
    rhs,
    "+ (1 | species) + (1 | cell)"
  ))
  
  # 4. Build 'include' list for splines
  include_list <- setNames(
    lapply(spline_terms, function(term) {
      paste0(term, 1:2)
    }),
    spline_terms
  )
  
  # 5. Fit with buildglmmTMB
  m_build <- buildglmmTMB(
    full_formula,
    data = d,
    family = gaussian(), #beta_family()
    buildmerControl = buildmerControl(
      direction = "backward",
      include  = include_list,
      crit     = "AIC",
      elim     = "AIC"
    )
  )
  print(summary(m_build@model))
  
    # 6. Quick lmer for collinearity check
  #    black_20 ~ var1 + var2 + … + (1|species) + (1|cell)
  test_formula <- as.formula(
    paste0("black_20 ~ ", paste(climate_vars, collapse = " + "), 
           " + (1 | species) + (1 | cell)")
  )
  test_mod <- lme4::lmer(test_formula, data = d)
  
  if(vifs){
    # 7. Compute & print VIFs
    vif_vals <- car::vif(test_mod)
    message("VIFs for climate predictors in simple lmer:\n")
    print(vif_vals) 
  }
  
  return(m_build@model)
}

#d_sp_cell <- d_sp_cell[ complete.cases(d_sp_cell), ]
m <- myBuildmer(climate_vars = c("tmean_sc", "srad_sc"),data=d_sp_cell)
plot_model(m)
plot_model(m, type="pred", terms = c("onset_sc [all]"))

plot_model(m, type="pred", terms = c("tmean_sc"))

pred_tmean <- ggpredict(m, terms = "tmean_sc")


plot_model(
  m,
  type  = "pred",
  terms = "tmean_sc [all]",    # <-- note the `[all]`
  show.data = TRUE
)

plot_model(
  m,
  type  = "pred",
  terms = "ns(srad_sc, 2)",
  show.data = TRUE
)
pred_srad <- ggpredict(m, terms = "srad_sc [all]")
plot_model(m, type = "pred", terms = c("tmean_sc","onset_sc"))
plot_model(m, type = "pred", terms = c("srad","onset"))
plot_model(m, type = "pred", terms = c("srad sc"))

m <- myBuildmer(climate_vars = c("tmean_sc", "vp_sc"),data=d_sp_cell)
plot_model(m)

plot_model(m, terms = c("tmean_sc","onset"))

plot_model(m, type = "pred", terms = c("tmean","onset"))
plot_model(m, type = "pred", terms = c("vpd_max","onset"))

m <- myBuildmer(climate_vars = c("tmean", "vp"),data=d)
plot_model(m, type = "pred", terms = c("tmean","onset"))
plot_model(m, type = "pred", terms = c("vp","onset"))
plot_model(m, type = "pred", terms = c("vp"))

m <- myBuildmer(climate_vars = c("srad", "vp"),data=d)
plot_model(m, type = "pred", terms = c("srad","onset"))
plot_model(m, type = "pred", terms = c("vp","onset"))

# vifs too high
m <- myBuildmer(climate_vars = c("tmean", "vp", "srad"),data=d)
plot_model(m, type = "pred", terms = c("tmean","onset"))
plot_model(m, type = "pred", terms = c("vp","onset"))

m <- myBuildmer(climate_vars = c("tmean"),data=d,vifs=FALSE)
plot_model(m, type = "pred", terms = c("tmean","onset"))

m <- myBuildmer(climate_vars = c("vp"),data=d,vifs=FALSE)
plot_model(m, type = "pred", terms = c("vp","onset"))

# 10% onset vs 5% onset, rare events can be tough with sampling 
# timing ~ obs_effort 
```

```{r}

ensure_clean_df <- function(df){
  #— 1) tibble → data.frame
  if (requireNamespace("tibble", quietly=TRUE) && tibble::is_tibble(df)) {
    df <- as.data.frame(df)
  }
  
  #— 2) drop rownames
  row.names(df) <- NULL
  
  #— 3) check names
  if (anyDuplicated(names(df))) {
    stop("Duplicate column names: ", paste(names(df)[duplicated(names(df))], collapse = ", "))
  }
  # make sure names are syntactically valid
  if (!identical(names(df), make.names(names(df), unique=TRUE))) {
    names(df) <- make.names(names(df), unique=TRUE)
    warning("Column names were repaired to syntactic names.")
  }
  
  #— 4) detect list‐columns or nested tibbles
  listy <- vapply(df, function(x) is.list(x) || inherits(x,"tbl_df"), logical(1))
  if (any(listy)) {
    stop("Found list‐columns or nested data.frames in: ",
         paste(names(df)[listy], collapse = ", "),
         ". Please unnest or remove them.")
  }
  
  #— 5) detect “unusual” classes
  allowed <- c("logical","integer","numeric","character","factor","Date","POSIXct","POSIXt")
  bad <- names(df)[!vapply(df, function(x) class(x)[1] %in% allowed, logical(1))]
  if (length(bad)) {
    warning("Columns with non‐atomic or custom classes: ", paste(bad, collapse = ", "),
            "\nThey will be coerced to character.")
    for (col in bad) df[[col]] <- as.character(df[[col]])
  }
  
  return(df)
}
d_sp_cell_saved <- d_sp_cell
d_sp_cell <- ensure_clean_df(d_sp_cell)
```

```{r}

library(ggplot2)
library(splines)
summary(m)

# 1) make a sequence over tmean_sc
new_t <- seq(
  from = min(d_sp_cell$tmean_sc, na.rm = TRUE),
  to   = max(d_sp_cell$tmean_sc, na.rm = TRUE),
  length.out = 100
)

# 2) build newdata (hold other vars at their means)
newdata <- data.frame(
  onset_sc  = mean(d_sp_cell$onset_sc,  na.rm = TRUE),
  tmean_sc  = new_t,
  vp_sc   = mean(d_sp_cell$vp_sc,   na.rm = TRUE),
  species   = NA,   # drop random effects
  cell      = NA
)

# 3) predict on the response scale
newdata$fit <- predict(m, newdata = newdata, type = "response", re.form = NA)

# 4) plot
ggplot(newdata, aes(x = tmean_sc, y = fit)) +
  geom_line() +
  labs(
    x = "Scaled mean temperature",
    y = "Predicted black_20"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
#' Plot interaction between two continuous predictors with confidence ribbons
#'
#' @param model A glmmTMB or lmer model object (with beta_family or logistic link)
#' @param data  Data.frame containing the variables used in the model
#' @param x_var Name of the x-axis predictor (string), e.g. "tmean_sc"
#' @param by_var Name of the interaction slicing predictor (string), e.g. "onset_sc"
#' @param other_var Name of the other continuous covariate to hold at its mean (string), e.g. "srad_sc"
#' @param outcome Name of the response variable (string), e.g. "black_20"
#' @param slice_vals Numeric vector: values of by_var at which to plot separate curves
#' @param tol Numeric tolerance for filtering raw data points around mean(other_var)
#' @param n   Integer: number of grid points along x_var
#' @return A ggplot showing predicted curves with 95% CIs and raw data points at matching conditions
#' @import ggplot2 dplyr scales
plot_model_interaction <- function(model, data,
                                   x_var, by_var, other_var,
                                   outcome = "black_20",
                                   slice_vals = c(-2, 0, 2),
                                   tol = 0.05,
                                   n = 100) {
  # ensure required packages
  if (!requireNamespace("ggplot2", quietly = TRUE) ||
      !requireNamespace("dplyr", quietly = TRUE)  ||
      !requireNamespace("scales", quietly = TRUE)) {
    stop("Required packages (ggplot2, dplyr, scales) must be installed.")
  }

  # 1) build grid for prediction
  x_seq <- seq(
    from = min(data[[x_var]], na.rm = TRUE),
    to   = max(data[[x_var]], na.rm = TRUE),
    length.out = n
  )
  grid <- expand.grid(
    x = x_seq,
    by = slice_vals,
    KEEP.OUT.ATTRS = FALSE,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  names(grid) <- c(x_var, by_var)

  # 2) hold other_var at its mean
  grid[[other_var]] <- mean(data[[other_var]], na.rm = TRUE)
  # drop random effects
  if ("species" %in% names(data)) grid$species <- NA
  if ("cell"    %in% names(data)) grid$cell    <- NA

  # 3) predict on link scale with SE
  pr <- predict(
    model,
    newdata = grid,
    type    = "link",
    re.form = NA,
    se.fit  = TRUE
  )
  # 4) transform back to response + CIs
  grid <- dplyr::bind_cols(grid,
    fit_link = pr$fit,
    se_link  = pr$se.fit
  ) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      lo_link = fit_link - 1.96 * se_link,
      hi_link = fit_link + 1.96 * se_link,
      fit      = plogis(fit_link),
      lower    = plogis(lo_link),
      upper    = plogis(hi_link)
    )

  # 5) label by_var slicing in original units if scaled
  sc_attr <- attributes(scale(data[[by_var]]))
  if (!is.null(sc_attr)) {
    center <- sc_attr$`scaled:center`
    sd     <- sc_attr$`scaled:scale`
    labels <- paste0(
      by_var, "=",
      round(slice_vals * sd + center, 1)
    )
  } else {
    labels <- as.character(slice_vals)
  }
  grid$by_lbl <- factor(grid[[by_var]], levels = slice_vals, labels = labels)

  # 6) filter raw data points matching slice & near mean(other_var)
  mean_other <- mean(data[[other_var]], na.rm = TRUE)
  raw_pts <- data %>%
    dplyr::filter(
      abs(.data[[other_var]] - mean_other) < tol,
      .data[[by_var]] %in% slice_vals
    )

  # 7) plot
  p <- ggplot2::ggplot(grid,
    aes(x = .data[[x_var]], y = fit,
        color = by_lbl, fill = by_lbl)
  ) +
    ggplot2::geom_ribbon(
      aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper),
      alpha = 0.2, color = NA
    ) +
    ggplot2::geom_line(size = 1) +
    # raw points at matching conditions
    ggplot2::geom_point(
      data = raw_pts,
      aes(x = .data[[x_var]], y = .data[[outcome]]),
      colour = "black", alpha = 0.5,
      inherit.aes = FALSE
    ) +
    scales::scale_color_manual(values = scales::hue_pal()(length(slice_vals))) +
    scales::scale_fill_manual(values  = scales::hue_pal()(length(slice_vals))) +
    ggplot2::labs(
      x      = x_var,
      y      = paste0("Predicted ", outcome),
      color  = by_var,
      fill   = by_var
    ) +
    ggplot2::theme_minimal()

  return(p)
}


plot_model_interaction(model=m, data=d_sp_cell,
                                   x_var="tmean_sc", by_var="onset_sc", other_var="srad_sc",
                                   slice_vals = c(-2, 0, 2),
                                   tol = 0.05,
                                   n = 100)
p <- plot_model_interaction(
  model      = m,
  data       = d_sp_cell,
  var        = "tmean_sc",
  interact_var = "onset_sc",
  slice_vals = c(-2, 0, 2),
  other_vars = c("srad_sc"),
  xlab       = "Scaled mean temperature",
  ylab       = "Predicted black_20"
)
p

p <- plot_model_manual_interaction(
  model      = m,
  data       = d_sp_cell,
  var        = "srad_sc",
  interact_var = "onset_sc",
  slice_vals = c(-2, 0, 2),
  other_vars = c("tmean_sc"),
  xlab       = "Scaled mean temperature",
  ylab       = "Predicted black_20"
)
p
```
